title: Temporary Closure of Bona Vacantia Office
body: "Please note that the Bona Vacantia Office and our usual published switchboard numbers will be closed on Monday 26th May and Tuesday 27th May 2025. If you wish to contact any of the teams for assistance during this period of closure, you can still contact Bona Vacantia using the email addresses published on the BV homepage. Normal service will resume on Wednesday 28th May 2025. "
